endpoints.sse: GET /sse (Establishes the session stream, returns a unique client_id)

available_tools.name: search_media
available_tools.description: Search media files (video, audio, images) by keyword in filename or title.

available_tools.name: browse_folder
available_tools.description: Browse files and subdirectories in a specific folder path.

available_tools.name: get_media_info
available_tools.description: Get detailed metadata for a specific media file by its numeric ID.

available_tools.name: get_server_stats
available_tools.description: Get server statistics including total media file counts by type.

available_tools.name: list_tvs
available_tools.description: Discover UPnP/DLNA MediaRenderer devices on the local network.

available_tools.name: cast_media_to_tv
available_tools.description: Cast a media file to a smart TV or media renderer by name.

available_tools.name: control_tv
available_tools.description: Send a playback control command (play, pause, stop) to a smart TV.

available_tools.name: list_media
available_tools.description: List all media files indexed on the server, optionally filtered by category (video, audio, image).

available_tools.name: list_playlists
available_tools.description: List all playlists currently stored on the server.

available_tools.name: delete_playlist
available_tools.description: Delete a playlist by its ID.

available_tools.name: add_to_playlist
available_tools.description: Add multiple media file IDs to a playlist in bulk.

available_tools.name: remove_from_playlist
available_tools.description: Remove a specific media file from a playlist.

available_tools.name: get_playlist_tracks
available_tools.description: Get all media files/tracks in a specific playlist.

available_tools.name: cast_playlist_to_tv
available_tools.description: Cast a playlist to a smart TV by name. Starts playing the first item.
